messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions
- Quote pages, chart pages, generic price pages, and low-information stock recaps are irrelevant even if they mention the ticker

Positions:
- AJG: growth archetype
- CPB: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: ASR Vermogensbeheer N.V. Acquires 21,448 Shares of Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. $AJG - MarketBeat
    Summary: ASR Vermogensbeheer N.V. Acquires 21,448 Shares of Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. $AJG MarketBeat

[1] Title: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day - MarketWatch
    Summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. stock outperforms competitors on strong trading day MarketWatch

[2] Title: A Look At Arthur J. Gallagher’s Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness - Yahoo Finance
    Summary: A Look At Arthur J. Gallagher’s Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness Yahoo Finance

[3] Title: Arrest made in Campbell Co. larceny incident; deputies still investigate additional thefts - WSET
    Summary: Arrest made in Campbell Co. larceny incident; deputies still investigate additional thefts WSET

[4] Title: Bernstein Maintains The Campbell's Co(CPB.US) With Hold Rating - Moomoo
    Summary: Bernstein Maintains The Campbell's Co(CPB.US) With Hold Rating Moomoo

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["AJG"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Institutional investor acquisition of AJG shares indicates continued institutional confidence in the position."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Generic daily performance recap with no new information or catalyst."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["AJG"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Valuation analysis provides context for the growth archetype positioning after recent price weakness."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 3,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Local crime report referencing a geographic county, not Campbell's Company (CPB)."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 4,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["CPB"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Hold rating maintained by Bernstein indicates expectations aligned with current growth archetype positioning."
  }
]
```
